Meta to use decentralized data storage protocol Arweave to store NFTs from Instagram - The Block

fundamentals: Arweave是永久数据存储区块链，采用proof-of-access共识
总供应量6600万，已全部流通，无通胀压力
AO计算平台和AR.IO存储网络已上线，但缺乏近期进展
marketRead: 当前价格1.98美元，较历史高点89.24美元跌去97.8%
DEX交易对AR/ASTER流动性仅17.7万美元，24小时交易量仅436美元，流动性极差
CEX数据未提供，但DEX数据表明交易冷清
risks: 流动性极低，滑点大，难以大额交易
价格处于长期下跌趋势，ATH跌幅超97%
近期无实质性新催化，新闻多为旧闻或价格预测
DEX交易对可能为假币或低流动性代币，需谨慎
市场情绪低迷，看涨比例仅33.33%
watchlist: AO生态是否有新应用或用户增长
是否有新的合作伙伴或集成
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko profile和DexScreener，DEX数据仅反映AR/ASTER交易对，非主流交易对
新闻多为旧闻或预测，缺乏近期实质性利好
CEX数据缺失，无法全面评估市场深度

profile.name: Arweave
profile.description: Welcome to the future of data storage A new data storage blockchain protocol based on a novel proof of access consensus mechanism that creates truly permanent data storage for the first time. Now data is finally permanent, low-cost, and truly censorship free. Arweave has solved the millennia old problem of decentralised data availability. Pay Once, Store Forever. Arweave makes permanent data storage a reality for the very first time. As the $3 trillion data-storage industry is growing, the need for cheap, distributed, permanent data-storage on the blockchain has become an urgent necessity.
